Package io.vanslog.spring.data.meilisearch.repository.support

Class MeilisearchRepositoryFactoryBean<T extends Repository<S,ID>,S,ID extends Serializable>

java.lang.Object
org.springframework.data.repository.core.support.RepositoryFactoryBeanSupport<T,S,ID>
io.vanslog.spring.data.meilisearch.repository.support.MeilisearchRepositoryFactoryBean<T,S,ID>
Type Parameters:
T - The type of the repository interface.
S - The type of the entity managed by the repository.
ID - The type of the identifier of the entity.
All Implemented Interfaces:
Aware, BeanClassLoaderAware, BeanFactoryAware, FactoryBean<T>, InitializingBean, ApplicationEventPublisherAware, RepositoryFactoryInformation<S,ID>
public class MeilisearchRepositoryFactoryBean<T extends Repository<S,ID>,S,ID extends Serializable> extends RepositoryFactoryBeanSupport<T,S,ID>
FactoryBean to create Repository instances.
Author:
Junghoon Ban
